summary: Preserve Lemon Squeezy catalog reality: products, variants, and files are public-API read-only; agents need capability metadata, dashboard handoff packets, and safe checkout creation after a variant exists.
reason: Lemon Squeezy's public API supports list/get for catalog resources and POST /v1/checkouts for existing variants, so generic import/create affordances otherwise send agents down impossible product-create and file-upload paths.
validated_outcome: go test ./..., go build ./..., go vet ./..., verify_skill.py, and smoke commands confirm read-only import refusal, negative which guidance, dashboard handoff output, and checkout dry-run JSON:API payload.
